final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing logo for a tech-lifestyle content creator focusing on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: clean flat vector logo, minimalist modern tech aesthetic, universal appeal across Eastern and Western markets
Subject: abstract geometric mark suggesting energy flow or connection, paired with a simple monogram or symbol, balanced negative space
Composition: centered mark with generous padding, scalable from small avatar to larger profile images
Color palette: neutral base (slate gray or soft black) with one accent color (electric blue or sage green), avoids culturally sensitive color combinations
Text (verbatim): none
Constraints: must read clearly at 64x64 avatar size; monochrome version must work without color; no religious, political, or culturally specific symbols; avoid hand gestures, animal motifs, or directional arrows that may carry unintended meanings
Avoid: gradients unless essential; complex illustrations; culturally specific iconography; aggressive or controversial imagery; Behance generic flat style; religious symbols; national flags or patriotic elements
